Off Calendar Oct-09-2007 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES- ATTY. JAMES O' DONNELL, TEL. NO. (925) 935-1707 APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFF;
NO OTHER APPEARANCE ON THE MATTER.

RULING - THE COURT ADOPTED IT'S TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS - Plaintiff Pheng Vue's Motion To Compel Depositions Of Treating Nurses is granted. Counsel shall agree upon dates for the depositions which shall be set for dates within 21 days of the date set for hearing of this motion. Plaintiff's request for sanctions is denied. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. COMM: EVERETT A. HEWLETT = (612/EAH)
